Name: MENU_STATS_PARAM
Description: Defines how player statistics are displayed in the in-game menu, including offensive power, defenses, resistances, and derived combat attributes.

Fields.Name: Max HP
Fields.Description: Maximum health value displayed in the menu.

Fields.Name: Max Stamina
Fields.Description: Maximum stamina value displayed in the menu.

Fields.Name: Poise
Fields.Description: Displays the player's poise (stagger resistance) in the menu.

Fields.Name: Spell Uses Level
Fields.Description: Determines spell usage scaling level shown in the menu.

Fields.Name: Spell Slots
Fields.Description: Number of available spell memory slots shown in the menu.

Fields.Name: Casting Speed
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting spell casting speed displayed in the menu.

Fields.Name: Physical Attack (Strength)
Fields.Description: Strength-based physical attack power displayed in the menu.

Fields.Name: Physical Attack (Dexterity)
Fields.Description: Dexterity-based physical attack power displayed in the menu.

Fields.Name: Magic Attack
Fields.Description: Magic attack power displayed in the menu.

Fields.Name: Fire Attack
Fields.Description: Fire-based attack power displayed in the menu.

Fields.Name: Lightning Attack
Fields.Description: Lightning-based attack power displayed in the menu.

Fields.Name: Dark Attack
Fields.Description: Dark-element attack power displayed in the menu.

Fields.Name: Poison Attack
Fields.Description: Poison buildup or damage value displayed in the menu.

Fields.Name: Bleed Attack
Fields.Description: Bleed buildup or damage value displayed in the menu.

Fields.Name: Durability Attack
Fields.Description: Damage value contributing to weapon durability reduction.

Fields.Name: Defense
Fields.Description: Overall physical defense value displayed in the menu.

Fields.Name: Magic Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance against magic damage.

Fields.Name: Fire Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance against fire damage.

Fields.Name: Lightning Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance against lightning damage.

Fields.Name: Dark Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance against dark damage.

Fields.Name: Poison Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance against poison buildup.

Fields.Name: Bleed Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance against bleed buildup.

Fields.Name: Durability Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance against durability loss from attacks.

Fields.Name: Petrification Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance against petrification effects.

Fields.Name: Curse Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance against curse status effects.

Fields.Name: Evasion Invincibility Time
Fields.Description: Duration of invincibility frames during evasive actions.

Fields.Name: Action Speed
Fields.Description: Overall speed modifier for various player actions.

Fields.Name: Physical Attack (Hollow)
Fields.Description: Physical attack power associated with hollow-related scaling.

Fields.Name: Max Equip Load
Fields.Description: Maximum equipment weight the player can carry without penalty.
